title: $FILELOAD_SINGLE_LINE
text: $FILELOAD_SINGLE_LINE Strip end-of-line character from empty input file when fileload or lfileload is used. $FILELOAD_SINGLE_LINE { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: Client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description When $FILELOAD_SINGLE_LINE is set to 1 , fileload or lfileload will strip the end-of-line character from an otherwise empty input file, so the resulting data is truly empty. Related Links fileload Copy the contents of a file into a field or variable. lfileload Copy the contents of a file into a field or variable, ignoring any file redirections in the assignment file.
